from sympy import I, Integer, pi, sqrt, symbols
from sympy.core.parameters import evaluate
from sympy.functions.elementary.complexes import im
x = symbols('x')
for a in [Integer(1), I, 2*I, 3 + I, pi, sqrt(2), x]:
    with evaluate(False):
        print(repr(a), 'is_number=', a.is_number, 'is_real=', a.is_real,
              'im=', repr(im(a)), 'bool(im)=', bool(im(a)))
PY"
